backend/main.mo: Motoko actor defining an industrial park enquiry system with typed variants for industry, plot size, and investment timeline, exposing submitEnquiry and getEnquiries endpoints backed by an in-memory list.
feature_evidence.json: Feature evidence report documenting a single high-confidence feature (REQ-40) to redesign the RK Industrial Park navbar logo/wordmark in Navbar.tsx for single-line display, stronger typography, and proper brand hierarchy.
frontend-file-summaries.txt: JSON map of frontend component file paths to short design/functionality summaries, serving as a reference document for the visual and structural intent of each section component.
frontend/index.css: Global Tailwind CSS entry file defining OKLCH-based CSS custom properties for light and dark themes covering background, foreground, card, sidebar, chart, and destructive color tokens.
frontend/index.html: HTML entry point with SEO meta tags, Open Graph and Twitter card metadata, Google Fonts preloads for Inter and Barlow Condensed, and JSON-LD structured data for Organization and LocalBusiness schemas.
frontend/src/App.tsx: Root React component that composes the full single-page layout by rendering all section components (Navbar, Hero, About, Location, Infrastructure, MasterPlan, PlotOptions, Industries, Invest, Compliance, Gallery, EnquiryForm, Footer) in order.
frontend/src/components/About.tsx: About section component rendering scroll-revealed stat cards and five pillar items describing the industrial park's vision, ecosystem approach, zoning, compliance, and infrastructure on a striped white background.
frontend/src/components/Compliance.tsx: Compliance section component displaying five certification cards (government approvals, zoning, environmental clearance, fire safety, industrial classification) with dot-pattern background and scroll-triggered fade-in animations.
frontend/src/components/EnquiryForm.tsx: A multi-field enquiry form component for industrial plot inquiries that validates inputs, maps plot size to typed backend values, and submits via a React Query mutation hook, showing success/error states.
frontend/src/components/Footer.tsx: Site footer component displaying the RK Industrial Park brand, contact details (address, phone, email), navigation links, and a brochure download button with a dark themed layout.
frontend/src/components/Gallery.tsx: A masonry photo gallery component with six site/construction images that supports a keyboard-navigable lightbox overlay for full-screen image viewing.
frontend/src/components/Hero.tsx: Full-screen hero section with an aerial background image, layered gradient overlays, animated brand headline, and CTA buttons for scrolling to enquiry or downloading a brochure.
frontend/src/components/Industries.tsx: A grid section showcasing supported industry types (Manufacturing, FMCG, Pharma, Cold Storage, Warehousing, Packaging, Engineering, Logistics) with inline SVG icons and scroll-triggered fade-in animations.
frontend/src/components/Infrastructure.t: Renders the Infrastructure section displaying a grid of industrial park amenities (roads, power, water, drainage, lighting, security, etc.) with SVG icons, descriptions, and a brochure download button, using IntersectionObserver for scroll-reveal animations.
frontend/src/components/Invest.tsx: Renders the Investment Case section listing five numbered investment rationale points (growth zone, infrastructure value, demand, compliance, expansion) with metrics, using a custom scroll-reveal hook for fade-in animations on a dark gradient background.
frontend/src/components/Location.tsx: Renders the Location section showing distance cards to key transport nodes (highway, rail, airport, city, ICD) and six connectivity highlights, with a Google Maps link for the park's coordinates in Gopalpur, Sikandrabad.
frontend/src/components/MasterPlan.tsx: Renders the Master Plan section embedding a PDF layout plan via an <object> tag, alongside a project summary table and infrastructure highlights list, with scroll-triggered fade-in animations and a CTA to scroll to the enquiry form.
frontend/src/components/Navbar.tsx: Renders a fixed top navigation bar with the RK Industrial Park brand lockup, desktop nav links, a mobile hamburger menu, and a CTA button, applying a shadow on scroll and smooth-scrolling to section anchors on click.
frontend/src/components/PlotOptions.tsx: Renders the Plot Options section displaying a table of five industrial plot configurations (100 sq.m to custom built-to-suit) with scroll-triggered fade-in animations and a CTA that scrolls to the contact section.
frontend/src/hooks/useActor.ts: Custom hook that creates and caches an ICP backend actor (authenticated or anonymous) using React Query, and invalidates dependent queries whenever the actor changes.
frontend/src/hooks/useInternetIdentity.t: Provides an InternetIdentityProvider and useInternetIdentity hook that manage DFINITY AuthClient lifecycle, login/logout state, and expose the current identity via React context.
frontend/src/hooks/useQueries.ts: Exports React Query hooks for fetching enquiries (useGetEnquiries) and submitting a new enquiry (useSubmitEnquiry) against the ICP backend actor.
frontend/src/index.css: Global stylesheet that sets up Tailwind base/components/utilities, defines an industrial OKLCH color palette with CSS custom properties (light and dark modes), and declares reusable utility classes for section headings, labels, and animations.
frontend/src/main.tsx: Application entry point that mounts the React app wrapped with QueryClientProvider and InternetIdentityProvider into the root DOM element.
frontend/tailwind.config.js: Tailwind CSS configuration that maps OKLCH CSS variables to semantic color tokens (primary, secondary, steel scale, industrial palette, etc.) and enables dark mode via class strategy.
project_state.json: Project state manifest (version 21) describing the RK Industrial Park website's architecture, design guidelines, known issues, and the full list of implemented features across all 12 site sections.
